attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.PROJECT_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.CLASS_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.CLASS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ADW_NOTIFY_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.CODE_PERCENTAGE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.OBJECT_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.OBJECT_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.RECORD_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES,
(
select CLASS_CATEGORY,CLASS_CODE,OBJECT_ID,OBJECT_TYPE,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES
minus
select CLASS_CATEGORY,CLASS_CODE,OBJECT_ID,OBJECT_TYPE,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES
) ACM
where 
 ACM.CLASS_CATEGORY = STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.CLASS_CATEGORY and 
 ACM.CLASS_CODE = STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.CLASS_CODE and 
 ACM.OBJECT_ID = STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.OBJECT_ID and 
 ACM.OBJECT_TYPE = STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.OBJECT_TYPE and 
ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_PROJECT_CLASSES.REFRESH_DATETIME
